name: cuebook
description: Query Cuebook market intelligence or turn a creator-owned trading viewpoint into a Frame with one title, one body, and one paired image.

interface.shortDescription: Query Cuebook data or create a title-body-image Frame
interface.longDescription: Cuebook has two explicit modules. Query searches, reads, compares, and explains Cuebook assets, stories, evidence, market data, metrics, and history without writing anything. Create preserves and improves the user's trading viewpoint, offers one optional follow-up about its news, signals, or intuition before any price question, then calls Query for material support and quickly returns one recommended Frame by default. A skipped follow-up moves directly into creation; three alternatives are produced only when requested. Every Frame shows exactly one title, one concise body, and one paired 2488 x 1056 viewpoint image. Release packaging and extra derivatives wait until selection, and publication always requires explicit first-party approval.
defaultPrompt: 查询 USO 最新叙事、市场状态和来源
比较 HOOD 与 COIN 的最新估值口径和市场表现
我觉得 BTC 未来 30 天会比现在高，帮我做成标题、正文和配图完整的 Frame
